description: This file defines an API client utility with a function 'apiFetch' that wraps the fetch API for making HTTP requests to a configured base URL. It supports JSON parsing, authentication via tokens, and query parameters. It handles errors by throwing detailed exceptions.

methods.name: apiFetch(path, { method = 'GET', token, body, query } = {})
methods.description: Asynchronous function that performs an HTTP request with specified parameters, parses JSON response, and throws detailed errors if the request fails.

ctags.name: apiFetch
ctags.pattern: /^export async function apiFetch(path, { method = 'GET', token, body, query } = {}) {$/
